name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages


  coordinator = 0;       (* coordinator ID *)
  messages = <<>>;       (* list of messages in the system *)

actions
  Init == /\ participants = <<1, 2, 3>>  (* example with 3 participants *)
          /\ coordinator = 0
          /\ messages = <<>>;

  Next == \/ CoordinatorAction
          \/ ParticipantAction;

  CoordinatorAction == /\ coordinator = 0
                     /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Prepare", from |-> 0, to |-> 1])
                     /\ messages' = Append(messages', [type |-> "Prepare", from |-> 0, to |-> 2])
                     /\ messages' = Append(messages', [type |-> "Prepare", from |-> 0, to |-> 3])
                     /\ messages' = <<>>;  (* coordinator clears messages after sending Prepare *)

  ParticipantAction == /\ \E p \in participants :
                     /\ \E msg \in messages :
                     /\ msg.from = p
                     /\ msg.type = "Prepare"
                     /\ messages' = <<>>;  (* participant clears messages after receiving Prepare *)
                     /\ \E vote \in {"VoteYes", "VoteNo"}
                     /\ messages' = Append(messages', [type |-> vote, from |-> p, to |-> 0]);

  CoordinatorDecision == /\ \E msg \in messages :
                       /\ msg.type = "VoteYes"
                       /\ \E msg2 \in messages :
                       /\ msg2.type = "VoteYes"
                       /\ \E msg3 \in messages :
                       /\ msg3.type = "VoteYes"
                       /\ messages' = <<>>;  (* coordinator clears messages after receiving all VoteYes *)
                       /\ messages' = Append(messages', [type |-> "Commit", from |-> 0, to |-> 1])
                       /\ messages' = Append(messages', [type |-> "Commit", from |-> 0, to |-> 2])
                       /\ messages' = Append(messages', [type |-> "Commit", from |-> 0, to |-> 3]);

  CoordinatorAbort == /\ \E msg \in messages :
                     /\ msg.type = "VoteNo"
                     /\ messages' = <<>>;  (* coordinator clears messages after receiving VoteNo *)
                     /\ messages' = Append(messages', [type |-> "Abort", from |-> 0, to |-> 1])
                     /\ messages' = Append(messages', [type |-> "Abort", from |-> 0, to |-> 2])
                     /\ messages' = Append(messages', [type |-> "Abort", from |-> 0, to |-> 3]);

  ParticipantCommit == /\ \E msg \in messages :
                      /\ msg.type = "Commit"
                      /\ messages' = <<>>;  (* participant clears messages after receiving Commit *)

  ParticipantAbort == /\ \E msg \in messages :
                     /\ msg.type = "Abort"
                     /\ messages' = <<>>;  (* participant clears messages after receiving Abort *)

  Next == \/ CoordinatorAction
          \/ ParticipantAction
          \/ CoordinatorDecision
          \/ CoordinatorAbort
          \/ ParticipantCommit
          \/ ParticipantAbort;

  Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>;

  TypeOK == /\ participants \in Seq(1..N)
            /\ coordinator \in 1..N
            /\ messages \in Seq([type |-> {"Prepare");

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
IsThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
IsHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
IsEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> {"free", "held"}]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "free"]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ (IsHungry(i) /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free" /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free" /\ 
        states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"] /\ 
        forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "held", ![RIGHT(i)] = "held"])
    \/ (IsEating(i) /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "held" /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "held" /\ 
        states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"] /\ 
        forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "free", ![RIGHT(i)] = "free"])
    \/ (IsThinking(i) /\ forks[i] = "free" /\ 
        states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"] /\ forks' = forks)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ LET maxNum == Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})
          IN /\ num[i] = maxNum + 1
             /\ flag[i] = TRUE
             /\ \A j \in 1..N :
                  /\ j # i
                  /\ flag[j] = FALSE
                  \/ /\ num[j] = 0
                  \/ /\ num[j] > num[i]
                  \/ /\ num[j] = num[i]
                      /\ j > i
             /\ flag[i] = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = <<>>
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = <<>>
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
